Video.summary: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 7

Image.alt: Tattoo Tales Episode 7
Tattoo Tales Episode 7
Tattoo Tales Episode 7

Video.summary: Excitement is in the air with a VIP client. Julie curates her life on her skin, while Shaun helps Sandy through a crippling struggle. It’s a celebration of life, with clients and staff all weighing in.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 8

Image.alt: Tattoo Tales Episode 8
Tattoo Tales Episode 8
Tattoo Tales Episode 8

Video.summary: Andrew risks life and limb on a hair raising ride, Nicky enjoys the sunshine coast on horseback, Snowy shows us his chilli barbecued fish, Paul learns about car safety and Dr Caroline shows us practical weight loss tips that really work.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 1
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 1
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: In episode two we visit the Sunshine coast’s most alternative sporting venue, Coxy and a special guest take us on a tour through Vietnam, Snowy shows us his recipes for romance, and Doctor Caroline shows us how pedal power keeps us healthy.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 2
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 2
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: Andrew straps on his skates, Nicky heads to the bush to learn the basics of survival, the humble omelette goes gourmet, Sophie takes us on a trip to Broome and Andrew gives us a step by step guide to superannuation.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 3
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 3
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: Georgie travels to Fremantle and finds a rich mix of contemporary culture and history, Colette learns to tow a caravan, Snowy creates a vegetarian treat, and Max meets an enterprising lady working a modern day miracle.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 4
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 4
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: Nicky explores Margaret River, from the comfort of a canoe, Andrew gets a handle on new fangled technology, Max takes us to Cradle Mountain in Tasmania and Andrew explores the pros and cons of making a tree change.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 5
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 5
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: Nicky goes to the Yarra Valley Ranges for an inspiring story about optimism. Andrew feels the heat at a bread-making workshop, Snowy gets some high-powered help in the kitchen… from his daughter Mia, and Dr. Caroline heads to the circus!
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 6
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 6
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 6

Video.summary: Andrew is in the glorious Tamborine Mountains, and visits the wild and wacky Tambourine Mountain distillery. Nicky goes paddle boarding in WA, Max takes us dining in Sydney, Snowy cooks with coconuts, and surf’s up for Coxy in Hawaii.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 7

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 7
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 7
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 7

Video.summary: In Episode Eight Andrew tests out his green thumb, Snowy demystifies vegetarian food with a fabulous soufflé, Nicky meets a lady who makes a living from luscious puddings and Coxy shows us around bustling Bangkok.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 8

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 8
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 8
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 8

Video.summary: Andrew’s leaving no artistic stone, Nicky takes charge on a WA farm, Snowy shares his tips for a mouth watering family roast, and Max digs out the pointy shoes to meets some rock ‘n’ roll baby boomers and check out their “crusin’ B&B”.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 9

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 9
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 9
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 9

Video.summary: Coxy’s on a trip of a lifetime in the Arctic! Also this episode, Andrew meets a lady bringing the taste of Africa to Australia, Snowy shows us how to make tender, juicy octopus and Dr. Caroline helps east the pain of arthritis.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 10

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 10
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 10
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 10

Video.summary: Coxy continues his adventure in the Arctic, Nicky meets a family weaving a bright future, Snowy spices things up with his easy prawn recipe, and Caroline shows us how what is in your shopping basket can make a big difference to your mood.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 11

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 11
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 11
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 11

Video.summary: Nicky travels to the Pyramids, and has them all to herself! Dr. Caroline shows us how three hours of stress busting can have us breathing easy, and Eric shares his finance tips on how we can all live the good life.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12

Video.summary: This family of four have four completely different ideas on what sort of dog they want. Dr. Lisa has her hands full! Can she find the dog for them?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: Dr. Lisa is given the job of finding a new family member for Cade & Matthew, still grieving the loss of their beautiful dog Callie. They want to find a new dog to join their family and help them heal the hurt.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6

Video.summary: Cheyne and Danielle live with a small menagerie, and want to add a dog to their blossoming family. With a sheep, and with four chickens running around in the backyard Dr. Lisa will need to keep her wits about her to find the right fit.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 7

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 7
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 7
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 7

Video.summary: Career woman Kylie lives in an inner city apartment but wants some four legged company. Kylie has places to walk a new friend, but will Dr. Lisa give her the OK to have a dog in a small apartment? How do dogs cope in such an environment?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 8

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 8
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 8
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 8

Video.summary: Jess, has wanted a dog for as long as she can remember, but living with her parents and renting has thrown up several ‘road blocks’. Jess wants a dog that her mum will cope with, and that will get along with her other passion….her horses.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9

Video.summary: Julien & Nicolette have three daughters, and Keira, 4, has an irrational fear of dogs. Dr. Lisa advises that the best thing to do might be to get a dog. Will the cure work and what special issues do three young girls put in her way?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10

Video.summary: In the very first Just Go episode Rhys uncovers some hidden gems in the Victorian town of Bendigo. Lee learns the secret behind some delicious but healthy food, and Geoff Cox visits tropical Port Douglas.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 1

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 1
Just Go Episode 1
Just Go Episode 1

Video.summary: On Queensland’s famous Gold Coast Lee explores iconic attractions and dines at a very entertaining restaurant. Rhys tries out a fun, unusual way to get fit in Melbourne, while Geoff Cox takes Lee to see Australia’s magnificent red centre.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 2

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 2
Just Go Episode 2
Just Go Episode 2

Video.summary: Lee and Rhys explore Victoria’s Bellarine Peninsula. Lee finds foodie heaven on the delicious Taste Trail, while Rhys jumps aboard the Blues Train in historic Queenscliff. Geoff Cox discovers a capital way to see the sights in Canberra.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 3

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 3
Just Go Episode 3
Just Go Episode 3

Video.summary: Rhys tours the world-class wine country of the Yarra Valley in style. Lee taste tests a breakfast with a twist and experiences the tantalizing delights of African cuisine. Geoff Cox explores Sydney.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 4

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 4
Just Go Episode 4
Just Go Episode 4

Video.summary: Lee visit the New South Wales north coast and gets up close to majestic wildlife in Byron Bay, then heads south to Melbourne for a foodie fix that takes her back to her Chinese roots. Rhys and Geoff Cox head to Albury on the Murray River.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 5

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 5
Just Go Episode 5
Just Go Episode 5

Video.summary: Lee explores the Mornington Peninsula, a destination that offers plenty to see and do, then cooks up a storm Vietnamese style and shares some of her favourite recipes. Rhys and Geoff Cox discover the beautiful New South Wales south coast.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 6

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 6
Just Go Episode 6
Just Go Episode 6

Video.summary: Rhys explores the Victorian coastal town of Inverloch, finding some high-octane fun. Lee discovers a hidden gem amongst Melbourne’s skyline, while Geoff Cox experiences the beautiful Tasmanian wilderness near Strahan.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 7

Image.alt: Just Go Episode 7
Just Go Episode 7
Just Go Episode 7

Video.summary: Paul visits the famous Hunter Valley wine region, serving up snails and Australia’s fresh water crayfish, the yabby, cooked with the Hunter’s local brews.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 1
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 1
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul finds foodie paradise on the little known Fleurieu Peninsula south of Adelaide, offering wine, wildlife and water in abundance.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 2
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 2
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: Paul travels to southern Tasmania to savour oysters straight from the sea, the season’s very last cherries and fish cooked fresh off the boat.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 3
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 3
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: Gorgeous Byron Bay with its stunning beaches and laidback lifestyle creates a perfect backdrop for Paul’s feast of the senses; the aroma of freshly ground coffee, beautiful clusters of Italian purple garlic and the delicate blueberry.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 4
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 4
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: North Queensland is a grower's paradise and Paul’s ready to enjoy the amazing array of fresh fruits, vegetables, seafood and meats on offer including juicy pineapples, a spot of tea and finally, some serious crocodile business.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 5
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 5
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: In this modern day Garden of Eden, that is Launceston and Northern Tasmania, Paul discovers the Valley of the Senses, is in sweet-tooth heaven on a raspberry farm and enjoys a spot of local fishing.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 6
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 6
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 6

Video.summary: Victoria's Bellarine Peninsula is filled with historic fishing towns, Paul’s in search of local mussels which are also used to create a unique beer plus sashimi that doesn’t come any fresher.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 7

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 7
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 7
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 7

Video.summary: Paul leads a gourmet tour of discovery in one of the world’s iconic cities, Sydney. With its lively fresh produce markets and colourful food stores, Paul’s preparing the ultimate al-fresco menu.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 8

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 8
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 8
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 8

Video.summary: Paul’s takes a taste adventure through the Gold Coast’s Hinterland where he meets a red hot tamale, learns the perfect way to enjoy excess fruit and discovers a true passion for pasta.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 9

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 9
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 9
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 9

Video.summary: Paul tours the Yarra Valley, fast becoming known for its free range food and incredible local produce. With plenty of lovely local cheese and wine to savour plus a local farmer’s market for inspiration, it’s foodie heaven.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 10

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 10
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 10
Mercurio's Menu Season 1 Episode 10

Video.summary: Tim visits his mate Milton in the Northern Territory to help relocate a problem croc, then back home microchips baby wombats and koalas, weighs Betty the python and then heads into the bush to check on the health of some platypus.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 1
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 1
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: Tim helps a friend move a 4-meter alligator from one pond to another, all in the name of love. He introduces us to one of his big passions, the Tasmanian Devil, and later, back at the park, extracts venom from snakes and spiders.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 2
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 2
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: Tim takes a trip to Dreamworld to see the mighty power of the park’s tigers, attends an emergency call out for an injured bird of prey, and tells us about one of Australian wildlife’s biggest threats, the cane toad.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 3
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 3
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: Tim and the team take their lives into their own hands entering the Alligator lagoon to retrieve eggs from some not so happy gator moms. Later he attends an emergency call-out to rescue a funnel web spider, and visits a bat rehab centre.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 4
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 4
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: A bully croc needs to be relocated in order to keep the peace. There’s the second installment of Tim’s quest to build a Tasmanian Devil insurance program at Devil Ark. And a rogue Death Adder is rescued from a bush garden.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 5
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 5
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: A visit to the Northern Territory and Tim is at a croc farm to see how problem wild crocs are dealt with. Back at the reptile park he introduces us to dingo pups Daisy and Dan before returning to Devil Ark to see how work is progressing.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 6
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 6
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 1 Episode 6

Video.summary: A big-hearted family needs Lisa's help to find them their first dog.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 1

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 1

Video.summary: Bubbly single mum Edwina is looking for a dog to grow up with her two little girls, but she's torn when it comes to choosing between two adorable pooches.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 2

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 2

Video.summary: Lisa faces a tough challenge trying to find the right dog for a teenager who's been wary of dogs all her life.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 3

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 3
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 3
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 3

Video.summary: Dr Lisa searches for the right dog for a busy young family.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 4

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 4
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 4
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 4

Video.summary: Dr. Lisa helps a young couple to find their very first dog.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 5

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 5

Video.summary: Lisa meets big-hearted pet lovers who already have a cat and one rescue dog and are ready to take on a second dog.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 6

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 2 Episode 6

Video.summary: Paul’s in Western Australia to enjoy the historic port town of Fremantle with its markets, great pubs and al-fresco dining. Then he’s off to the Margaret River region to savour world class wine and more fabulous fresh produce.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 12

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 12
Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 12
Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 12

Video.summary: Paul visits Darwin, the vibrant capital city of the Northern Territory in Australia’s top end. With its youthful population and tropical climate, Paul’s here to discover the unique local markets and restaurants in this food haven
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 13

Image.alt: Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 13
Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 13
Mercurio's Menu Season 2 Episode 13

Video.summary: Tim comes across two lizards in Queensland with extraordinary camouflage skills. A life and death situation emerges for a Tasmanian devil joey and Tim gives us a run down of his five favourite Aussie spiders.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 15

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 15
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 15
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 15

Video.summary: The reptile park’s 6 metre reticulated python needs an emergency visit to the vet. We then accompany Tim on morning feed out to see how varied the diets are at the park.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 16

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 16
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 16
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 16

Video.summary: Tim heads to Central Australia to see what effects drought and introduced feral pests are having on local wildlife before heading back up to Devil Ark to check on this seasons new arrivals.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 17

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 17
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 17
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 17

Video.summary: Seven juvenile alligators need rescuing from a muddy ending. Science and wildlife meet at the park as Tim counts down his five favourite Aussie snakes.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 18

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 18
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 18
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 18

Video.summary: Tim visits the West MacDonnel Ranges in Central Australia to discover its wildlife , amazing geography and the story of its people.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 19

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 19
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 19
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 19

Video.summary: Tim encounters some rare exotic cats in Tasmania before heading to an island where the wildlife mimics that of the mainland before the introduction of feral pests. Then back at the reptile park its time to get bushfire ready.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 20

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 20
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 20
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 2 Episode 20
